title: Sweet Jamaican Date Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful dessert made with sweet dates, Jamaican spices, and medjool dates, perfect for a special treat. The tagine cooking method adds depth to the dish without added sugar.
instructions: 1. Rinse the medjool and pungent dates and remove the pits.
2. In a large tagine, combine the dates, Jamaican spice blend, and 1 cup of water.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
4. Remove the tagine from the heat and let it cool slightly.
5. Serve the tagine warm, garnished with additional dates if desired.
